narrative:
Tuscarawas County has 56,421 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.1% of registrants.
